summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mission Control dashboard iteration 3 - all new Kanban tasks, enhanced inboxes, calendar integration, and AgentMail webhooks working perfectly
passed_tests: Backend: PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status with all 3 status values (open, in_progress, completed)
Backend: GET /api/calendar/feeds returns empty array initially
Backend: POST /api/calendar/feeds creates feed successfully
Backend: DELETE /api/calendar/feeds/{id} removes feed
Backend: GET /api/calendar/events returns empty events when no feeds configured
Backend: POST /api/webhooks/agentmail accepts webhook payload
Backend: GET /api/agentmail/inboxes/{inbox_id}/messages supports labels parameter
Backend: POST /api/agentmail/inboxes/{inbox_id}/messages/{message_id}/labels updates labels
Backend: All 33 API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Frontend: 'Made with Emergent' badge successfully removed
Frontend: Tasks view shows Kanban board with 3 columns (Open, In Progress, Completed)
Frontend: Kanban cards display brand pills, due dates, and status change buttons
Frontend: 'In Progress' button successfully moves task to In Progress column
Frontend: 'Done' button functionality available on task cards
Frontend: Inboxes message list shows tabs (All, Received, Sent)
Frontend: Messages display unread dot indicators (27 unread indicators found)
Frontend: Calendar view shows 'Connect Your Calendar' when no feeds configured
Frontend: Calendar nav item visible in sidebar
Frontend: Overview page works with all modules (4 stats cards, embedded tasks, embedded inboxes)
Integration: Task status updates work end-to-end (frontend buttons → backend API → UI updates)
Integration: Calendar feed management ready for iCal integration
Integration: AgentMail webhook endpoint ready for real-time events
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (33/33 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all new features working)
